Author: Midnight Noon
Name: GATE Notifier
Punchline: Get notified about upcoming Gold Saucer GATEs.
Description: Alerts you before Gold Saucer GATE events with configurable per-GATE preferences, countdown overlay, DTR bar timer, and chat/toast notifications. Detects active GATEs via chat and GATE Keeper NPC dialogue for early reveals. Use /gate to toggle overlay, /gate config for settings.
